---
title: "Совкомбанк. Макро."

date: today
#date-format: "YYYY[Q]Q"
---

## НОВОСТИ
* [28-фев. Заметки об экономике: Заботкин](https://t.me/centralbank_russia/3335) (Источник *Банк России*)
* [Направления экономических исследований](https://t.me/centralbank_russia/3303)(Источник *Банк России*)
* [13-янв. Заявление ЦБ по ставке](https://t.me/centralbank_russia/3296)(Источник *Банк России*)


## Тепловая карта
```{python}
#| output: asis
import sys
from IPython.display import display, HTML

from db_utils import sovdb_read
from db_utils import plot_season
from datetime import datetime
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib as mpl
import pandas as pd
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta
from datetime import timedelta
from cycler import cycler
import math
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['axes.titlelocation'] = 'left'
plt.rcParams['axes.titlesize'] = 20
plt.rcParams['axes.titleweight'] = 'bold'
plt.rcParams['axes.titlepad'] = 20

plt.rcParams['axes.spines.top'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.left'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.bottom'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.right'] = False

plt.rcParams['figure.autolayout'] = True


#CBRSM_COLORS = ['#0051CA', '#F8AC27', '#3F863F', '#C6DBA1', '#FDD65F', '#FBEEBD', '#50766E'];
COLORS_DEF = ['#1D4688','#E31E25','#29524A','#D1AC76','#ABD5CD','#715B64','#BEC5AD'];

#prop_cycle = plt.rcParams['axes.prop_cycle']
#№colors = prop_cycle.by_key()['COLORS_DEF']
plt.rcParams['axes.prop_cycle'] = cycler('color', COLORS_DEF)
mpl.rcParams['text.color'] = COLORS_DEF[0]

Start = datetime(2023,1,1)
Last_MPC = datetime(2026,2,13)
x_lab_m = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']
# Настройки рисков (-1 дезинфляционные 1 - проинфляционные 0 - нейтреальные)
sectors = {
    "Банки и денежная масса": -1,
    "Реальный сектор": -1,
    "Занятость": -1,
    "Внешний сектор": 1,
    "Бюджет": 1,
    "Рынки": 0
}

def get_risk_color(level):
    """
    Вычисляет цвет от зеленого (144, 238, 144) до красного (255, 99, 71)
    """
    if level == 1:
        return COLORS_DEF[1]
    else:
        if level == -1:
            return COLORS_DEF[0]
        else:
            if level == 0:
                return COLORS_DEF[3]
    
        return f"rgb({r}, {g}, {b})"

html_output = '<div class="risk-grid">\n'

for name, level in sectors.items():
    color = get_risk_color(level)
    html_output += f"""
    <div class="risk-card" style="background-color: {color};">
        <div class="risk-title">{name}</div>
    </div>
    """
html_output += '</div>\n'
display(HTML(html_output))
```

## Банки и денежная масса
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
tick = "RU_M2XXFXSA_M_CB"
data = sovdb_read(tick,Start+relativedelta(months=-1))        
titl = "M2X, exc FX diff, SA (YTD, EOM), "
freq = "M"
is_pop = 1; is_norm=1; show_ends = 1; rnd_to = 3
fig, ax = plot_season(data, freq, titl, is_pop, is_norm, show_ends, rnd_to)  
#plt.close(fig) 
plt.show()
plt.close()

```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
tick = "RU_DTSURV_OTHSECMOMEXFX_M_CB"
data = sovdb_read(tick,Start+timedelta(days=1))

n_y = math.ceil((data.shape[0])/12)
fig, ax = plt.subplots()
for i in range(n_y):
    if i==n_y-1:                
        temp = data.values[((i+1)-1)*12:]
        #temp = np.cumprod(1+temp/100)
        if temp.shape[0] == 1:
            p1 = ax.plot(temp, 'xr') 
        else:                    
            p1 = ax.plot(temp, 'r') 
            ax.text(temp.shape[0]-1, float(np.ravel(temp)[-1]), temp[-1][0], color='r');#
    else:

        temp = data.values[((i+1)-1)*12:(i+1)*12]
        #temp = np.cumprod(1+temp/100)
        p1 = ax.plot(temp, color=COLORS_DEF[0]) 
        ax.text(11, float(np.ravel(temp)[-1]), str(data.index[((i+1)-1)*12].year), color=COLORS_DEF[0]);#

ax.axhline(y=0, color='k', linestyle='-')        
plt.xticks([r for r in range(len(x_lab_m))], x_lab_m)   
ax.set_xticklabels(x_lab_m, rotation=90) 
plt.title("Claims on other: Total, mom, ex FX, "+data.index[-1].strftime('%b-%Y'))
plt.show() 
plt.close(fig)
```
:::
::::

## Реальный сектор
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
df = sovdb_read("RU_GDPRYOY_M_ME",Start)
plt.figure()
plt.plot(df)
plt.text(df.index[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1])
#plt.axvline(Last_MPC,color='r',linestyle='--')
plt.axhline(0,color=(0.7,0.7,0.7))
plt.title("Минэк: ВВП ежемесячно, "+df.index[-1].strftime("%b,%y"))    
plt.show()
plt.close()

```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
df = sovdb_read("RU_COMPMON_BC_NC_0_SA_M_CB",Start)
plt.figure()
plt.plot(df)
plt.text(df.index[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1],round(df['Value'].iloc[-1],2))
plt.title("ЦБ: Индикатор бизнесс-климата, "+df.index[-1].strftime("%b,%y"))    
plt.show()
plt.close()
```
:::

::::

## Занятость
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
df = sovdb_read("RU_UNEMPLR_M_RS",Start)
plt.figure()
plt.plot(df)
plt.text(df.index[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1])
#plt.axvline(Last_MPC,color='r',linestyle='--')
#plt.axhline(0,color=(0.7,0.7,0.7))
plt.title("Безработица, %, "+df.index[-1].strftime("%b,%y"))
plt.show()
plt.close()

```
:::
## Внешний сектор
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
#Start_l = datetime(2025,1,1)
df = sovdb_read("RU_OIL_TAX_M_OFF",Start)
df1 = sovdb_read("CMDT_OILBRENT_FOB_EU_RT",Start)
plt.figure()
plt.plot(df)
plt.plot(df1,color=COLORS_DEF[0],linestyle=':')
plt.text(df.index[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1],str(df['Value'].iloc[-1]))
plt.text(df1.index[-1],df1['Value'].iloc[-1],str(df1['Value'].iloc[-1]))
plt.legend(["Нефть для налогообложения, "+df.index[-1].strftime("%b, %d"), "Brent, FOB, "+df1.index[-1].strftime("%d, %b, %y")],frameon=False) 
plt.axvline(Last_MPC,linestyle='--',color=COLORS_DEF[1])
plt.title("Нефть")
plt.show()
plt.close()

```
:::

## Бюджет
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
Start_l = datetime(2025,1,1)

df = sovdb_read("RU_KBK_209251_FED_M_FT",Start_l)/1000000000000
df = df.asfreq('M').groupby(pd.Grouper(freq='Y')).diff().fillna(df)                        

plt.figure()
plt.bar(df.index, df.Value, width=15)
plt.text(df.index[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1],str(round(df['Value'].iloc[-1],2)))
#plt.axvline(Last_MPC,linestyle='--',color=COLORS_DEF[1])
plt.axhline(df['Value'].iloc[-1],linestyle='--',color=COLORS_DEF[0])

plt.title("Баланс фед бюджета, трлн руб., "+df.index[-1].strftime("%b, %d"))
plt.show()
plt.close()

```
:::

## Рынки
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
Start_l = datetime(2025,1,1)
df = sovdb_read("FX_RUBUSD_CBR",Start_l)
df_0 = df[df.index<Last_MPC]
chng = str(round((df['Value'].iloc[-1]/df_0['Value'].iloc[-1]-1)*100,2))+"%"
plt.figure()
plt.plot(df)
plt.text(df.index[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1],str(df['Value'].iloc[-1])+" ("+chng+")")
plt.axvline(Last_MPC,linestyle='--',color=COLORS_DEF[1])
#plt.axhline(0,color=(0.7,0.7,0.7))

plt.title("RUBUSD. "+df.index[-1].strftime("%b, %d"))
plt.show()
plt.close()

```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
Start_l = datetime(2025,1,1)
df = sovdb_read("FX_RUBCNY_CBR",Start_l)
df_0 = df[df.index<Last_MPC]
chng = str(round((df['Value'].iloc[-1]/df_0['Value'].iloc[-1]-1)*100,2))+"%"
plt.figure()
plt.plot(df)
plt.text(df.index[-1],df['Value'].iloc[-1],str(df['Value'].iloc[-1])+" ("+chng+")")
plt.axvline(Last_MPC,linestyle='--',color=COLORS_DEF[1])
#plt.axhline(0,color=(0.7,0.7,0.7))

plt.title("RUBCNY. "+df.index[-1].strftime("%b, %d"))
plt.show()
plt.close()

```
:::
::::
